Selected plan: Standard — GHS 600/year

📲 How to Pay

1 Send your payment to: MoMo: 0244 000 000 or Bank: GCB Bank, Acc: 1234567890
2 Use your business name as the payment reference
3 Fill in the form below and upload your payment proof
4 Admin will verify and activate your subscription within 24 hours
